name: Potato Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and boil them in salted water until they are soft. Drain and mash them smoothly.
2. Blend in the egg yolks, corn starch, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly to form dumplings. You may need to add a little flour to help the dumplings hold their shape.
3. Roll each dumpling in flour, then drop it into rapidly boiling water. Cover and cook for about 15 or 20 minutes until cooked through.
